questionHtml:
Carbon (C-12) and hydrogen (H-1) undergo nuclear fusion to form nitrogen.

C+612H →N+11 photon

What is the number of neutrons and number of nucleons in the nitrogen nuclide?

meta.title: Carbon (C-12) and hydrogen (H-1) undergo nuclear fusion to form nitrogen. C+612H →N+11 photon What is the number of neutrons and number of nucleons in the nitrogen nuclide?
